\tzpentry{ID3518}{Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3518 introduces Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ H_{\text{int}} = \hbar J (a^\dagger b + b^\dagger a) + \hbar K (a^\dagger a b^\dagger b) \quad(\text{nonlinear coupling}), \]
